sourceRefs.summary: SETD1B broad H3K4me3 claim graph locator.
Official GEO Series page for GSE242515.
Raw BED domain pilot stats, checksums, parameters, and comparison output.

notebookRefs.summary: Raw BED domain pilot merge/count cell.

environmentRefs.summary: Pilot uses Python standard library only.

cells.purpose: Download configured public BED gzip interval files, merge intervals within 500 bp, and count merged domains longer than 5 kb.

codeRef.summary: Config-driven Python stdlib runner for BED gzip download, interval merge, domain-width filtering, checksums, and refs-first artifact emission.

outputRefs.summary: Computed input interval, merged domain, and selected-domain counts.

diagnostics: RS4_WT: 21080 input intervals, 20613 merged domains, 2876 selected domains.
RS4_Setd1bKO: 13810 input intervals, 13737 merged domains, 83 selected domains.

notes: This pilot starts from deposited GEO peak BED files, not FASTQ/BAM alignment, so it tests the configured interval-domain rule and perturbation direction but not peak-caller reproducibility.
